payload.answer: Sara cannot be both your daughter and your niece simultaneously. These relationships are mutually exclusive. The existing claim (daughter) and new input (niece) directly contradict each other.
citations: Existing memory: Sara is my daughter
New input: Sara is my niece
payload.decision: Preserve both claims as conflicting observations pending clarification

entity_resolution.reason: Kinship relationship is mutually exclusive; cannot be both daughter and niece. Requires user clarification or additional context.

details: Conflict detected: mutually exclusive kinship roles
